message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
package "Bean" {
    [lable] <<C>> #lightgreen;line:green;text:black;bold 
        + int ID : String info
    
    note right of lable:图书分类，用来控制添加或修改图书时\n控制器选项范围,不与book建立直接联系

    user --|> root :继承
    borrower -up-|> user :继承
    admin-up-> |user :继承


[borrower]<<c>># lightgreen ; line green text black bold  
+String firstName:String lastName:string idcardno string email m_phonenumber creditrating 

[admin]<><< c >>## LightGreen Line Green Text Black Bold   
firstName lastname Email Root Boolean  

[user ]<< C ><>LightGreengreenTextBlackBoldID pwd createTime status byte 


[ticket]> <(ticket)> <>Line greentextblackbolddate returnDate boolean flag N1拥有管理包含N ticket bookDetList inherit borrowHis date returnedFlag boolen short deadline bytesatus ownedbyBookDetailInfo number record one-to-one relation between them via their respective attributes like ISBN name label logo information price publisher author publishdate stock etc.. These relationships help us understand how different entities interact within our system architecture! Let me know if there's anything else I can assist you with regarding this particular aspect 😊👍



@enduml
